text: The purpose of this video is to illustrate our technique of a repair of a perforated duodenal ulcer via laparoscopic approach.

The surgeon mobilizes the greater omentum from the transverse colon. Three number one Vicryl sutures on a CT-II needle are introduced and positioned to secure an omental patch over the perforated duodenal ulcer.

The assistant holds the omental patch in place while the surgeon ties the sutures tightly over the perforated duodenal ulcer, without approximating the ulcer edges. The patch covers the ulcer site, and additional sutures may be added for a better seal.
